projects.title: Firebase Studio - Next.js Blog Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack blog platform supporting authentication, content management, and user comments. Integrated GitHub notifications and OTP-based server verification for secure access. Designed an API explorer enabling developers to interact with the platform programmatically.
highlights: Full-stack blog platform with authentication and content management

projects.title: Ecommerce AI - Flipkart & Amazon Price Comparison
projects.description: Built a full-stack app to compare Amazon and Flipkart prices using RapidAPI. Implemented a secure backend proxy and a responsive React UI. Added an optional AI shopping assistant and deployed with environment-based configs.
highlights: Price comparison across major e-commerce platforms
Secure backend proxy with RapidAPI integration

projects.title: Dynamic Book to Story Adaptor
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered tool that transforms books into interactive 'what-if' narratives using Weaviate embeddings and GPT. Implemented PDF upload, chapter parsing, and a responsive Angular UI with seamless Node.js/Express integration.
highlights: AI-powered book transformation into interactive narratives

experience.description: Developed 4 real-world projects including a portfolio, bakery website, calculator, and click counter using React, CSS3, JavaScript, Git, and GitHub. Designed responsive UIs, implemented DOM logic, and practiced agile collaboration. Attended sessions on React.js, debugging practices, and participated in a frontend quiz event.
highlights: Designed responsive UIs and implemented DOM logic

experience.company: Main Flow Services and Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
experience.description: Analyzed datasets using Python to extract insights. Worked on data preprocessing and visualization. Collaborated with teams to understand workflows.
